Location_en-US.54454998535966720: Needs a bit o' work, but the moose approve and the private lake is just a cast away.
Location_en-US.111527339556675584: Brave the chill at {location/ocean1-spot2} or {location/ocean2-spot2} to toughen up for colder waters.
Location_en-US.111527339565064192: Hook a {fish/rainbow-trout}, good prep for what’s ahead.
Location_en-US.111527339569258497: Wet yer line at {location/lake2-spot1}, any fish’ll do.
Location_en-US.111527339569258498: Snag yourself a {fish/lingcod}. Nothin’ fancy, just do it.
Location_en-US.111527339569258499: Reel in a {fish/chinook-salmon}. Big fellas, so hold on tight.
Location_en-US.111527339569258500: {fish/striped-bass} is the name o’ the game. Get one.
Location_en-US.137751287510851584: Explore the nearby lake then come see me if you're lookin' to set up your own cozy cabin.

Tip_en-US.353822040064: Stop reeling when the fish is fighting hard
Tip_en-US.462622285824: Upgrade your line <style=hint>strength</style> and <style=hint>length</style> to handle bigger fish
Tip_en-US.11116708093952: Return to dock when your storage is full
Tip_en-US.27192334475264: Hold longer before releasing to cast further
Tip_en-US.13714739963092992: Try a <style=hint>different lure</style> if the fish aren't interested
Tip_en-US.15105663989440512: Use a <style=hint>bigger rod</style> to catch bigger fish
Tip_en-US.15105663997829120: Use a <style=hint>smaller rod</style> if your target fish is spooked
Tip_en-US.15110807959363584: Use a <style=hint>fluoro</style> line rod if the fish are spooked easily
Tip_en-US.135366773709123584: Clear the trash and bring your pond back to life
Tip_en-US.136799157860085760: While out on your boat, use the logbook to restock the pond
Tip_en-US.138218815184089088: Land a trophy weight? A replica mount goes up her to remember it by!
Tip_en-US.138232854391992320: Restore your pond before using the Fish Viewer
Tip_en-US.138256174306996224: Catch all sizes of a freshwater species to stock your pond
Tip_en-US.138993370156675072: Now that your cabin is fixed, disembark and explore
Tip_en-US.139029425228525568: Walk up to the cabin to head inside
Tip_en-US.140369437241028608: Catch a fish you’ve released to remove it from your stocked pond

Items_en-US.466145501184: Reliable, nimble, and tough as northern brush.
Items_en-US.571397365760: Nothin’ fancy, just a solid stick to get your line wet and maybe land your first catch!
Items_en-US.2706063220736: No gas, no glory, just guts.
Items_en-US.2810790797312: Runs like a dream, if your dream's full of smoke and lake water.
Items_en-US.12061204670308352: Tough as a dock post, built for mid-sized mayhem, and casts like a dream.
Items_en-US.12061204670308354: Sports an invisible line the fish can't see comin'.
Items_en-US.12062273827758081: Chucks bait so far it needs its own zip code, great for wrestlin' the deep critters.
Items_en-US.12062273827758083: Heavy-duty rod made for bruisers and toothy critters.
Items_en-US.12683519334539264: Clatters through the chop like a chipmunk on caffeine. Tons of space though.
Items_en-US.12683519338733569: It's not the size that counts.
Items_en-US.12683519338733571: Sleek, steady, and built to turn heads ‘n haul catch.
Items_en-US.12683519338733573: Loaded with every bell and whistle - none of ‘em necessary, all of ‘em nice.
Items_en-US.20058493363937284: Short, stout, and made for fightin’ the big ones. A bit like Evie-Jean.
Items_en-US.51922548471566336: Drifts through the deep, stealthy as they come.
Items_en-US.69585853153615872: Versatile rod to break the first ice and beyond.
Items_en-US.69585853153615874: Where the deep cold bites back, this rod holds firm.
Items_en-US.69649741400317953: Carves trails like a chainsaw through cedar.

Text_en-US.12483108988248064: Lure is too small for your rod
Text_en-US.12483108996636672: Lure is too big for your rod
Text_en-US.15290618199662592: Your save is from a newer version of the game. You may <style=warn>lose progress</style> if you continue without updating.

Dialogue_en-US.17493385216: Well hey there, bud! I'm Rusty. Come on in.
Dialogue_en-US.109310894080: All the gear’s over on the right there: lures, rods, boats and upgrades. The whole shebang.
Dialogue_en-US.544537042944: Holler if ya need a hand or a good story, I got both in spades.
Dialogue_en-US.25412892614656: Look who’s back with a stringer full! Beauty, bud!
Dialogue_en-US.25301902942208: Well hey there, stranger! Thought you’d gone south with the geese.
Dialogue_en-US.25552286113792: Well slap me with a pike tail an’ call me lucky, look who’s wandered back into the shop!
Dialogue_en-US.26685561888768: Back from the wilds, eh? Thought maybe a bear’d adopted ya!
Dialogue_en-US.26685561888769: Well butter my auger, yer back! Just in time too, the fish’ve been actin’ weird without ya.
Dialogue_en-US.26802213871616: Well I’ll be… Back in the land of leeches and lunkers, are ya?
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200320: Well I’ll be... a haul like that? Yer on fire!
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200321: Back already? Fish must be jumpin’ in the boat!
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200322: Now that’s what I call a comeback!
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200323: You bring supper or just braggin’ rights?
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200324: Well slap a bass and call it Tuesday, look at that grin!
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200325: Ha! You been fishin’ or stealin’ from a hatchery?
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200326: Back with a bounty, eh? Yer rod’s earnin’ its keep!
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200327: Holy smokes, you clean out the lake or just the cocky ones?
Dialogue_en-US.29585558200328: That cooler better be heavy or we’re fightin’.
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394624: Look what the wind blew in, good ta see ya, bud.
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394625: There ya are! Place ain’t the same without yer boots on the floor.
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394626: Back in the land o’ bait and coffee, are ya? Welcome home.
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394627: Well if it ain’t my favourite shop loiterer, how the heck are ya?
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394628: Door creaks different when it’s you comin’ through. Glad yer back.
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394629: About time you showed, was startin’ to think you’d been abducted by geese.
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394630: Hey now! You bring the weather or just the charm?
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394631: Rusty’s rule: coffee’s free if I like ya. Yer mug’s earnin’ it.
Dialogue_en-US.29585562394632: Ain’t it nice when the good ones come back? Welcome, pal.
Dialogue_en-US.46266800136192: Pull up a stool, the coffee’s on and the minnows missed ya.
Dialogue_en-US.47318224068608: Good ta see yer mug again. The lake’s been askin’ about ya.
Dialogue_en-US.47318228262912: Somethin’ in the air or maybe they just missed yer scent.
Dialogue_en-US.47318228262913: Don’t just stand there like a stunned perch, grab a coffee an’ tell me what trouble ya been into.
Dialogue_en-US.4822494220378112: You here for worms or winnin'? 'Cause I'll tell ya, this year's <style=hint>Monster Walleye Trophy</style> is still up for grabs.
Dialogue_en-US.4822494241349632: Ain't nobody broke the record, yet. <style=hint>Nineteen pounds</style>! Last year, it was little Evie-Jean took the crown.
Dialogue_en-US.4822494241349633: Surprised everyone too. Tiny gal with a busted boat motor and a cooler full o' snacks. Hauled in a beast like it was nothin'.
Dialogue_en-US.4822494241349634: Rules are simple: any rod n lure, no cheats.
Dialogue_en-US.4822494241349635: You <style=hint>land a Walleye heavier</style> than Evie-Jeans and that trophy's yours… along with a year's worth of braggin' rights.
Dialogue_en-US.4832040028463104: Lil tip for ya, ain't no point trying to wrangle a beast like that with poor gear.
Dialogue_en-US.4841432228552704: Well I’ll be… You went and did it! That fish on the wall? <style=hint>Over 20 pounds</style> of pure muscle. A real beauty.
Dialogue_en-US.4841432236941312: Folks been stoppin' by just to see it. Even Evie-Jean swore she’s comin’ back swingin’.
Dialogue_en-US.4841432236941313: You’ve earned your braggin’ rights. Name’s on the board, trophy’s yours, and there’s a new legend over the counter.
Dialogue_en-US.4841432236941314: Just don't let it go to your head. Walleye have a way of humblin' folks.
Dialogue_en-US.16786638590959616: Grabbin’ a fishing license lets ya unlock new waters to fish, ’cause the best lunkers don’t hang out by the dock!
Dialogue_en-US.16786638595153920: Nice pick, bud! Fawnmirror’s a real gem, peaceful as can be, with fat trout hidin’ in the lilies. Soak it in and keep that line tight!
Dialogue_en-US.20348091549868032: Well I’ll be, a fish from every hole in {location/river1-spot1}? Not too shabby, bud!
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062336: Looks like yer rod’s still twitchin’, and wouldn’t ya know it, there’s a sweet lil’ spot upriver at {location/river1-spot2}.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062337: Ain't nothin' like haulin' in a fat ol' {fish/largemouth-bass} after givin' yer a workout.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062338: Heard there’s a swarm of little {fish/rockbass} up at {location/river1-spot3}, thicker’n skeeters on a July evening.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062339: Well I'll be, ya went toe-to-toe with a {area/river2} monster and came out on top. Damn fine work!
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062340: Now go on, treat yerself to the view up at {location/river2-spot2}, you’ve earned it.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062341: Gettin’ sweet on them <style=hint>trout</style>, are ya? Once you hook one, it’s like tryin’ to eat just one chip in the bag - good luck!
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062342: Plenty more where that came from. They’re bitin’ easy over at {location/lake1-spot1}.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062343: Catchin’ {fish/lake-trout}’s a little piece o' heaven - calm water, crisp air, and that sudden tug that sets your heart racin’.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062344: Only downside? Them blasted {fish/common-carp}, stirrin’ up muck, spookin’ the trout, rootin’ ‘round like hogs in the cabbage patch.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062345: Those {fish/lingcod} - bless ’em - they’ve got a face only a mother could love. Mean-lookin’ mug, all teeth and grump, but they fight hard and fry up just fine.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062346: The locals spotted a monster over at {location/ocean1-spot2}. Reckon you're up for it?
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062350: Out at {location/ocean2-spot2}, even the seals are fightin’ for a piece o’ the action.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062351: Hauled in a big {fish/steelhead-trout} did ya? Thing must've fought like a wolverine on a bad day.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062352: Got this new rod in too - good for haulin' more like it, the freshwater kind anyway, or chuckin' bait way out deep.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062353: Some fish spook faster than a deer on openin’ day - ’specially if you’re usin’ regular line.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062354: Grab yerself a rod strung with fluoro - it’s near invisible.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062359: You’ve been holdin’ your own, bud, but out in the deep blue, the fish don’t mess around.
Dialogue_en-US.20348091554062360: Might be time to step it up. Just got the {rod/rod05} in.
Dialogue_en-US.20364754026487808: Yer a real gem, y'know that?
Dialogue_en-US.20404196942536704: Just keep an eye on the sky or you might lose your catch!
Dialogue_en-US.20452238584438784: Hang on, I’ll scribble it on yer map. Don’t say I never gave ya nothin
Dialogue_en-US.20766281513820160: Do ol’ Rusty a solid and clear a few out over at {location/lake1-spot3} when ya get a minute, eh?
Dialogue_en-US.21135721946406912: Now yer talkin’. Grizzly Ridge is wild country.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721984155648: Salmon fightin’ the current, bears belly-deep in the river, and eagles watchin’ from above.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721984155649: Keep yer head on a swivel and your drag set right, this ain’t no kiddie pond!
Dialogue_en-US.21135721984155650: Whew, Icewater Sea, eh? That’s the edge o’ the world right there.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721984155651: Storm-blown skies, gulls ridin’ the wind, and the sea crashin’ like it’s got a grudge.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721984155652: Fishin’ out here ain’t gentle, it’s for the tough and the lucky.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721988349952: Old Wreck Bay’s got stories buried in the deep - sunken boats, lazy seals, and waters that’ll give ya chills.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721988349953: It’s quiet now, but the sea out here remembers every storm. Drop a line, but keep one eye on the waves.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738560: This spot’ll guzzle your fuel, no doubt about it.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738561: And if you tangle with a river monster down at the far end, your rod’s in for a workout.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738562: Lucky for you I just got a {rod/rod07} in, fresh and feisty.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738563: Ain’t cheap, sure, but you’ll earn it back quick haulin’ in them river monsters.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738564: Top-tier caster - nothin’ out there throws farther or digs deeper.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738565: If you’re chasin’ legends, you’ll need to wet a line mornin’, noon, and night, no tellin’ when they’ll show.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738566: Them legends don’t run on a schedule - you gotta be ready whenever they feel like showin’ up
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738567: Dawn, dusk, dead o’ night - ain’t no tellin’ when a legend’ll rise from the deep.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738568: Fishin’ for legends? Better pack breakfast, lunch and a lantern.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738569: Topwater’s all about action, the more wiggle and splash, the better the bite.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738570: Goin’ after the little guys? Grab a rod marked ‘S’, light line won’t spook the skittish ones.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738571: If fish are dartin’ off when they see your lure, chances are your setup’s stickin’ out like a sore thumb.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738572: Ain’t always about the catch, y’know, sometimes it’s just you, the water, and a bit of quiet.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738573: Take a breath, bud. Fishin’ ain’t just what ya reel in, it’s what it does for your head.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738574: After you cast, don’t rush. Just sit back and soak in the stillness.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738575: The good boy loves a pat, keep him happy and he’ll keep an eye on the deep for ya.
Dialogue_en-US.21135721996738576: Not diggin’ your boat’s paint? Swing by the dock, you can freshen her up easy.
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932864: Ol' Hank set out to {location/ocean1-spot3}, chasin’ the biggest King he ever laid eyes on. Said it was the colour of reddish charcoal, like it’d been pulled straight from a fire.
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932865: Fella got obsessed. Wouldn’t shut up about it. Then one day, he just... went. Took his old tin boat out into the mist. Never came back.
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932866: Boat’s still out there, some say. Drifts in and outta the fog like it’s lookin’ for home.
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932867: That mount? It’s for Hank. Or for whoever finishes what he started with that legendary {fish/chinook-salmon}.
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932868: I’ll be... You actually went an' did it
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932870: Colour like scorched iron... girth like a keg o’ nails. Just like Hank described. Took half his life and all his luck chasin’ that fish.
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932871: He’d be proud. Or jealous as heck.
Dialogue_en-US.21135722000932872: Mount’s yours now. That wall ain’t empty no more.
Dialogue_en-US.21507345539391488: ‘Round these parts, the biggest of the bunch earn the name <style=hint>Legendary Catches</style>.
Dialogue_en-US.21507345547780096: They’re mean, they’re stubborn, and they ain’t comin’ easy. You’ll need more than your everyday gear to land one.
Dialogue_en-US.21507345547780097: If you’re huntin’ legends, best be out there castin’ from dawn to dark. They show themselves at certain times of day so if they ain’t bitin’, kick back and have a <style=hint>snooze</style>.
Dialogue_en-US.21507345547780098: Word 'round the lake is that big ol’ legendary {fish/largemouth-bass}'s been seen stirrin' at <style=hint>dusk</style>.
Dialogue_en-US.21507345547780099: That’s all I’m spillin’, friend, the rest? Well, that’s up to you an’ luck.
Dialogue_en-US.22150385601863680: Don’t forget - legends like that only show themselves at certain times o’ day, so keep yer line in and be patient, eh?
Dialogue_en-US.50133533682503680: If you’re headin’ to {location/lake2-spot1}, keep it low and slow.
Dialogue_en-US.50133533703475200: Those catfish down there ain’t fast, but they’re thick as stump water and twice as strong.
Dialogue_en-US.50133533703475201: The {rod/rod08}’ll handle it no sweat, just mind your drag.
Dialogue_en-US.50133533703475202: One wrong move and they'll bury ya in the mud.
Dialogue_en-US.50133533707669504: Autumnwood Lake, she's a stunner in the fall!
Dialogue_en-US.50133533707669505: Mind the {fish/northern-pikeminnow}, though - nasty little bait thieves, more pest than fish.
Dialogue_en-US.52285441633357824: You heard of {location/lake2-spot2}? Some say whatever’s down there got sealed in when the last ice melted and they been growin’ ever since.
Dialogue_en-US.67849132590309376: Winter’s rollin’ in, good time to hit {area/ice1}.
Dialogue_en-US.67849132619669504: Your boat won’t do ya much good on {location/ice1-spot1} though, but I know someone sellin’ a {boat/snowmobile}. I can hook ya up if you're keen.
Dialogue_en-US.67849132619669505: Them big fellas don’t come out just anytime, they take turns to lord over the lake throughout the day.
Dialogue_en-US.67850283033370624: Heh, new sled suits ya. Since I got a nice cut o’ the deal, I'll throw in {rod/rod09} on the house.
Dialogue_en-US.67850283033370625: Up at {location/ice1-spot1} there's twice the species in one spot, but they move like they’re wadin’ through molasses, real slow like.
Dialogue_en-US.70750007430156288: Just don’t drop it down a hole like I did my first time!
Dialogue_en-US.70750007451127808: I know you been enjoyin’ that ice fishin’, but if you wanna land one o’ them ice monsters, you’re gonna need more than that glorified toothpick you’re jiggin’ with.
Dialogue_en-US.134357092316393472: Heh… noticed that trophy, did ya?
Dialogue_en-US.134357092345753600: Well now your beauty’s sittin’ pretty over at that cabin, I figured I’d best get an extra replica done up for the shop.
Dialogue_en-US.134357092345753601: Don’t wanna forget a fine catch like that, eh!
Dialogue_en-US.135960815461195776: Your own private pond... and for that price? Practically stealin' it.
Dialogue_en-US.135960815494750208: As it says on the tin it needs a bit of fixeruppin', some elbow grease and a weekend or ten, but I'm sure you can handle it.
Dialogue_en-US.143512695867432960: Well now, that lil patch o’ wilderness out by {area/lake2} finally hit the market.
Dialogue_en-US.143512695905181696: Wouldn’t be bringin’ it up if I didn’t reckon you had the backbone to whip that rough place into shape. Last folks there left it lookin’ like a beaver fight.
Dialogue_en-US.143512695905181697: Drop by the shop if you’re thinkin’ of claimin’ it. I’ll see ya get a fair bargain.

Achievement_en-US.240060665858: Buy and upgrade everything in the shop.
Achievement_en-US.240060665862: Catch and release one of every species of fish.
Achievement_en-US.240060665865: Land a big enough Walleye to get on the wall in Rusty's tackle shop.

Achievement_en-US.240060665877: Catch an XL sized fish without looking under the water surface.
Achievement_en-US.240060665879: Catch an XXL sized fish without looking under the water surface.
Achievement_en-US.240060665881: Catch a trophy weight fish for all species.
Achievement_en-US.240060665884: Catch the trophy weight Common Carp.
Achievement_en-US.240060665886: Catch the trophy weight Northern Pike.
Achievement_en-US.240060665892: Land the trophy weight Largemouth Bass.
Achievement_en-US.240060665894: Land the trophy weight Lake Trout.
Achievement_en-US.240060665896: Land the trophy weight Cutthroat Trout.
Achievement_en-US.240060665898: Catch the trophy weight Atlantic Salmon.
Achievement_en-US.240064860161: Land Ol' Hanks lost trophy weight King Salmon.
Achievement_en-US.240064860165: Land the trophy weight Pacific Halibut.
Achievement_en-US.240064860167: Catch the trophy weight Striped Bass.
Achievement_en-US.240064860169: Land the trophy weight Channel Catfish.
Achievement_en-US.240064860171: Land the trophy weight White Sturgeon.
Achievement_en-US.240064860173: Lose a fish after fighting it for 2 minutes.
Achievement_en-US.240064860175: Catch a fish again after releasing it.
Achievement_en-US.240064860177: Catch a fish with another fish.
Achievement_en-US.240064860179: Land the trophy weight Tiger Muskie.
Achievement_en-US.19838621388800: Drill a hole in the ice.
Achievement_en-US.19838621388802: Catch 12 fish from the same hole.
Achievement_en-US.39052647487315968: Catch every size of every species.
Achievement_en-US.73134745769390080: Clean all rubbish out the pond
Achievement_en-US.73134745769390082: Restore the cabin to its former glory
Achievement_en-US.73134745769390086: Stock the pond to the max

Location_zh-CN.54454998535966720: 需要稍加修缮，但只要麋鹿点头认可，在私人湖泊中垂钓完全不在话下。
Location_zh-CN.111527339556675584: 在{location/ocean1-spot2}或{location/ocean2-spot2}直面严寒以适应更寒冷的水域。
Location_zh-CN.111527339565064192: 钓一条{fish/rainbow-trout}，为接下来的挑战做好充分准备。
Location_zh-CN.111527339569258497: 在{location/lake2-spot1}试水你的鱼线，什么鱼都行。
Location_zh-CN.111527339569258498: 为你自己捉到一条{fish/lingcod}。没什么特别的，照做就行了。
Location_zh-CN.111527339569258499: 钓起一条{fish/chinook-salmon}。大家伙，一定要抓紧了。
Location_zh-CN.111527339569258502: {fish/largemouth-bass}。去捕获这种鱼，就是这么简单。
Location_zh-CN.111527339569258503: 驯服一条{fish/muskie}，如果你足够勇敢的话。
Location_zh-CN.137751287510851584: 去附近的湖区转转，要是想建座属于自己的小木屋，就回来找我。

Tip_zh-CN.462622285824: 升级鱼线的<style=hint>强度</style>和<style=hint>长度</style>才能钓到更大的鱼
Tip_zh-CN.13714739963092992: 如果鱼不上钩，试试<style=hint>不同的鱼饵</style>
Tip_zh-CN.15105663989440512: 用<style=hint>更大的钓竿</style>才能钓到更大的鱼
Tip_zh-CN.15105663997829120: 如果目标鱼四散而逃，改用<style=hint>更小的钓竿</style>试试
Tip_zh-CN.15110807959363584: 如果鱼很容易被吓跑，改用<style=hint>氟碳线</style>钓竿试试
Tip_zh-CN.135366773709123584: 清理垃圾，让你的池塘重焕生机
Tip_zh-CN.136799157860085760: 乘船出行时，用日志簿来补充池塘的鱼群
Tip_zh-CN.138256174306996224: 只要集齐某种淡水鱼的所有体型，即可将其放养到你的池塘中
Tip_zh-CN.140369437241028608: 钓起你已放养在池塘里的鱼，即可将其从池塘中移除
Tip_zh-CN.138218815184089088: 钓上够分量的奖杯级大鱼了？这儿就能挂起它的标本留作纪念啦！
Tip_zh-CN.138232854391992320: 请先修复你的池塘，再使用鱼类查看器
Tip_zh-CN.138993370156675072: 小屋已经修好了，下船去四处逛逛吧
Tip_zh-CN.139029425228525568: 走到小屋跟前即可进入

Achievement_zh-CN.240060665858: 购买并升级店内所有物品。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665862: 每个鱼种钓获并放生一条鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665865: 钓到一条足够大的玻璃梭鲈，就能在拉斯蒂渔具店的墙上展示。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665868: 在一次游玩中爱抚你的伙伴10次。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665873: 同时吸引5条鱼吞下你的鱼饵。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665875: 在不从水面以下观察的情况下，钓上一条L尺寸的鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665877: 在不从水面以下观察的情况下，钓上一条XL尺寸的鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665879: 在不从水面以下观察的情况下，钓上一条XXL尺寸的鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.240060665881: 捕获所有鱼种的奖杯级鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.240064860161: 捕获老汉克错失的奖杯级帝王鲑。
Achievement_zh-CN.240064860165: 捕获奖杯级太平洋比目鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.240064860173: 在与一条鱼拉锯2分钟后让它跑掉。
Achievement_zh-CN.240064860175: 在放生一条鱼后再次捕获它。
Achievement_zh-CN.240064860177: 用一条鱼捕获另一条鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.19838621388802: 从同一个冰洞中捕获12条鱼。
Achievement_zh-CN.39052647487315968: 捕获所有鱼种的各种体型。
Achievement_zh-CN.73134745769390080: 清除池塘内的所有垃圾
Achievement_zh-CN.73134745769390086: 将池塘鱼群补充至上限

Text_zh-CN.12483108988248064: 鱼饵太小，不适合你的钓竿
Text_zh-CN.12483108996636672: 鱼饵太大，不适合你的钓竿
Text_zh-CN.15290618199662592: 你的存档来自游戏的更新版本。如果在不更新的情况下选择继续，你可能会<style=warn>丢失进度</style>。
Text_zh-CN.90242974270431233:
游戏分享
+ 游戏聊天
Text_zh-CN.114234421404491776: 返回码头才能前往别处

Dialogue_zh-CN.17493385216: 嘿，伙计！我是拉斯蒂。快进来吧。
Dialogue_zh-CN.109310894080: 右边全是装备：鱼饵、钓竿、小船和升级配件。应有尽有。
Dialogue_zh-CN.544537042944: 需要帮忙或想听个好故事就喊我，这两样我可都多得是。
Dialogue_zh-CN.25552286113792: 哎呀，真是走运了，看看是谁又回到店里来了！
Dialogue_zh-CN.46266800136192: 拉把凳子坐下，咖啡煮好了，小鱼们都想你了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.26685561888768: 从野外回来了？我还以为你被熊收养了呢！
Dialogue_zh-CN.47318224068608: 真高兴又见到你。湖泊都在念叨你呢。
Dialogue_zh-CN.26685561888769: 乖乖，你可算回来了！来得正是时候，你不在的时候鱼儿们都不对劲。
Dialogue_zh-CN.47318228262912: 要么是天气作怪，要么是它们想念你的味道了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.26802213871616: 哎哟喂……又回到这满是水蛭和大鱼的地盘啦？
Dialogue_zh-CN.47318228262913: 别像条呆鲈鱼似的傻站着，来杯咖啡，说说你又闯了什么祸。
Dialogue_zh-CN.25412892614656: 瞧瞧这是谁，满载而归！真行啊，伙计！
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200320: 好家伙……收获这么多？你今天手气爆棚啊！
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200321: 这么快就回来了？鱼该不会自己往你船上跳吧！
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200323: 你这是带晚餐回来，还是纯粹来炫耀的？
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200324: 哎哟喂，瞧你那小样儿乐的！
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200325: 哈！你这是去钓鱼还是去养殖场偷鱼啊？
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200326: 收获不小嘛？你这钓竿可真够本！
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200327: 老天爷，你是把湖捞空了还是专挑嚣张的下手？
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585558200328: 那个冷藏箱要是不够沉，咱俩可得干一架。
Dialogue_zh-CN.25301902942208: 嘿，稀客啊！还以为你跟着大雁南飞了呢。
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394624: 哟，什么风把你吹来了，见到你真高兴，伙计。
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394625: 你可算来了！这地板少了你的靴子印儿，店里都不对劲。
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394626: 又回到这满是鱼饵和咖啡香的地方啦？欢迎回家。
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394627: 哎呦喂，这不是我最爱的闲逛大王吗？最近咋样啊？
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394628: 这门你一推，嘎吱声都不一样。回来就好。
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394629: 你可算露面了，我都要怀疑你是不是被大雁拐跑啦！
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394630: 嘿！你这是把好天气带来了，还是专程来散发魅力的？
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394631: 拉斯蒂的规定：看顺眼的咖啡管够。你这张脸啊，值这个价。
Dialogue_zh-CN.29585562394632: 好伙计回来就是舒坦，欢迎啊老兄。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4822494220378112: 今天是来买鱼饵还是来夺冠的？我跟你说，今年的<style=hint>怪兽玻璃梭鲈奖杯</style>可还空着呢。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4822494241349632: 还没有人破纪录呢。<style=hint>十九磅</style>！去年是小艾薇·琼斯赢得了冠军。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4822494241349633: 大家都惊掉下巴啦。那么个小丫头，划着马达失灵的小船，带着满冷藏箱零食，轻轻松松就拽上来这么个大家伙。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4822494241349634: 规则很简单：不限钓竿和鱼饵，不许作弊。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4822494241349635: 你只要<style=hint>钓到一条比艾薇·琼斯更重的玻璃梭鲈</style>，奖杯就归你……你还能吹上一整年牛皮。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4832040028463104: 给你个小建议：破烂装备可降不住这种级别的怪物。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4841432228552704: 好家伙……真给你办成了！墙上那条？<style=hint>超过二十磅</style>的纯肌肉。漂亮得不像话。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4841432236941312: 大家都特地过来看那条鱼。连艾薇·琼斯都发誓要卷土重来呢。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4841432236941313: 这下你可有得吹了！名字上了荣誉榜，奖杯归你，柜台从此多了一段新传说。
Dialogue_zh-CN.4841432236941314: 不过可别得意忘形。玻璃梭鲈专治各种不服。
Dialogue_zh-CN.16786638590959616: 去弄张钓鱼执照来解锁新的垂钓水域吧，要知道那些庞然巨物可不会乖乖地待在码头边等你啊！
Dialogue_zh-CN.16786638595153920: 真会选，老兄！鹿镜湖是块真正的宝地，无比静谧，睡莲里躲着成群的肥鳟鱼。尽情享受，拉紧钓线！
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091549868032: 嗬，真不敢相信，{location/river1-spot1}的每种鱼都被你钓到了？真不赖啊，朋友！
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062336: 看来你的钓竿已经跃跃欲试了，你还不知道呢吧，{location/river1-spot2}上游有个不错的小钓点哦。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20452238584438784: 等一下，我帮你记在地图上。可别说我从来没给过你好处啊。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062337: 没什么感觉能比在费尽力气之后拉上来一条肥硕的{fish/largemouth-bass}更爽的了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062338: 听说在{location/river1-spot3}有一群小{fish/rockbass}，密度堪比七月晚上的蚊子。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062339: 嗬，真不敢相信，你和{area/river2}怪物来了场正面对决，而且还赢了。真有你的！
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062340: 现在去吧，好好享受一下{location/river2-spot2}的美丽景色，这是你应得的。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20404196942536704: 一定盯着点天上，要不然你可能会落得个两手空空！
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062341: 开始喜欢上这些<style=hint>鳟鱼</style>了，是不是？只要钓到一条，那感觉就像是打开了薯片包装却只吃一片——祝你好运！
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062342: 这种鱼在它们的出水点还有很多。在{location/lake1-spot1}那边它们非常好钓。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062343: 钓{fish/lake-trout}就像天堂里的短暂一刻——平静的湖水、清新的空气，手上突然一紧，让你的心跳骤然加速。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062344: 唯一的坏处？那些该死的{fish/common-carp}，不停地搅起淤泥，吓跑鳟鱼，像猪一样在菜园里乱翻一气。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062345: 那些{fish/lingcod}——上帝保佑它们——长得可真是丑到家了。那凶神恶煞的表情，满嘴尖牙而且脾气暴躁，不过它们虽然难抓，油炸起来却很美味。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062346: 本地人在{location/ocean1-spot2}看到了一只巨怪。你要不要挑战一下？
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062350: 在{location/ocean2-spot2}那边，连海豹都想和你争抢一番。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062351: 刚刚钓上来一条巨大的{fish/steelhead-trout}，是吧？这家伙肯定挣扎得像只生气的狼獾一样激烈。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062352: 我也是刚刚拿到这款新钓竿——适合对付更大的鱼类，淡水里的那种，或是需要把鱼饵丢很远的那种。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062353: 有些鱼胆子小得跟狩猎季第一天的鹿一样——特别是你用普通钓线的时候。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062354: 为你自己添置一把氟碳线钓竿吧——细到几乎看不见。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062359: 你一直表现很不错，朋友，但在深海区，那里的鱼类可不好对付。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20348091554062360: 也许是时候鸟枪换炮了。我刚刚拿到这支{rod/rod05}。
Dialogue_zh-CN.20364754026487808: 你可真是个大好人，有人告诉过你没？
Dialogue_zh-CN.20766281513820160: 帮老拉斯蒂个忙，有时间去{location/lake1-spot3}钓几条鱼上来，行吗？
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721946406912: 这还差不多。{area/river2}是真正的野外。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721984155648: 鲑鱼逆流而上，灰熊趟水抓鱼，还有老鹰在上虎视眈眈。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721984155649: 留意四周的动静，调好放线距离，这可不是什么小孩子玩的池塘！
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721984155650: 呦，冰水海啊？那里简直是世界的尽头了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721984155651: 狂风肆虐，海鸥翻飞，海浪就像有什么深仇大恨一样反复拍打。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721984155652: 在这里钓鱼可不讲绅士风度，只有硬汉和幸运儿才能成功。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721988349952: 旧沉船湾的海底藏了不少故事——沉船、慵懒的海豹，还有寒冷彻骨的海水。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721988349953: 别看它现在风平浪静，但这片海记得每一场风暴。一边下竿，一边盯紧海浪。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738560: 这钓点会把你的燃料喝光，我可一点都没夸张。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738561: 如果你在下游碰上一只河流巨怪，你的钓竿可要经受考验了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738562: 你运气不错，我刚拿到一支{rod/rod07}，新鲜出炉，充满活力。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738563: 价格确实不便宜，但它能助你钓上河流巨怪，所以你很快就能回本。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738564: 顶级抛杆——市面上没有哪把钓竿能比它抛得更远、钓得更深。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738565: 如果你想追逐传奇大鱼，就需要从早钓到晚，因为没人知道它们何时会现身。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738566: 传奇大鱼没有规律可言——你必须随时做好准备，它们随时都有可能现身。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738567: 清晨、黄昏、半夜——没人知道传奇大鱼什么时候会从水底冒出来。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738568: 想钓到传奇大鱼？最好备齐三餐，还要带盏灯。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738569: 水面饵的关键在于动作，晃得越活泼、水花越多，鱼儿咬得就越凶。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738570: 想钓小点的家伙？选择一把标有“S”的钓竿，轻线才不会吓跑那些一惊一乍的家伙。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738571: 如果鱼儿一看到你的鱼饵就迅速逃离，很可能是你的装备太显眼了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738572: 收获往往不是最重要的，有时候只有你、水面，还有一丝宁静的感觉才最棒。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738573: 深吸一口气，朋友。钓鱼不仅仅是为了钓上来什么，它能带给你的感觉才最重要。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738574: 竿抛出去之后，不要别急。放松坐好，享受那份宁静。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738575: 这乖孩子喜欢有人摸，让他保持开心，他会帮你盯着水下的动静。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135721996738576: 不喜欢你的船只的涂装？去码头转转，你可以轻松让她焕发活力。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932864: 老汉克当年是奔着{location/ocean1-spot3}去的，去钓那条他这辈子见过的最大帝王鲑。他说那鱼身上的颜色像烧红的炭灰，就好像刚从火堆里出来一样。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932865: 老兄彻底着迷了。一天到晚不停地谈论那条鱼。然后有一天，他就这样……走了。开着他那条老破船，消失在浓雾里。再也没回来。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932866: 有人说，船后来又出现了。在雾里若隐若现，好像在寻找回家的路。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932867: 那个底座？那是给汉克准备的。或者说是给能为他与那条传奇级{fish/chinook-salmon}的故事画上句号的人准备的。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932868: 真不敢相信……你真的成功了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932870: 红得像烧焦的铁……壮得像装钉子的桶。和汉克描述得一模一样。为了追逐这条鱼，他花了半辈子时间，用尽了所有运气。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932871: 他一定会感到骄傲。或者嫉妒得要死。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21135722000932872: 底座现在是你的了。那面墙终于不再空着了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21507345539391488: 在这一带，体型最大的家伙才能被称为<style=hint>传奇渔获</style>。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21507345547780096: 它们凶狠、顽强，而且很难钓上来。要想钓到这种家伙，只靠日常装备可不够。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21507345547780097: 如果你想捕获传奇大鱼，最好从早钓到晚。它们只会在一天中的特定时段出现，所以如果它们没动静，你可以放松身心，稍微<style=hint>打个盹</style>。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21507345547780098: 据湖边的人说，那条巨大的传奇大鱼{fish/largemouth-bass}最近经常在<style=hint>黄昏</style>时分出没。
Dialogue_zh-CN.21507345547780099: 我要说的就这么多了，朋友，其他秘诀？这么说吧，考验人品的时候到了。
Dialogue_zh-CN.22150385601863680: 别忘了——那种传奇大鱼只会在一天中的特定时段现身，所以把线留在水里，耐心等待，好吧？
Dialogue_zh-CN.50133533682503680: 要是你准备去{location/lake2-spot1}，务必小心行事，步步为营。
Dialogue_zh-CN.50133533703475200: 那地方的鲶鱼速度不快，但它们如树桩存水一般黏稠，力气更是翻倍。
Dialogue_zh-CN.50133533703475201: {rod/rod08}就可以轻松应对，只是收杆时要多加小心。
Dialogue_zh-CN.50133533703475202: 一个闪失，它们就能把你拖进烂泥里。
Dialogue_zh-CN.50133533707669504: 秋林湖，秋天的她美不胜收！
Dialogue_zh-CN.50133533707669505: 但务必要提防{fish/northern-pikeminnow}——烦人的鱼饵小偷，与其说它是鱼不如说它是害虫。
Dialogue_zh-CN.52285441633357824: 你听说过{location/lake2-spot2}吗？有人说那片水域里有什么东西在上次冰河融化之后就被困住了，然后就一直在不断长大。
Dialogue_zh-CN.67849132590309376: 冬天就要来了，正是去{area/ice1}一试身手的好时候。
Dialogue_zh-CN.67849132619669504: 只可惜，你那艘船在{location/ice1-spot1}可派不上太大用场。不过，我认识一个卖{boat/snowmobile}的人。如果你愿意，我可以介绍你们认识。
Dialogue_zh-CN.67850283033370624: 嘿，新雪橇和你很搭啊。既然这笔买卖我也小赚了一笔，就免费送你一支{rod/rod09}吧。
Dialogue_zh-CN.70750007430156288: 只是别像我第一次冰钓那样，把鱼竿掉到冰洞里！
Dialogue_zh-CN.67850283033370625: 在{location/ice1-spot1}这个地方，每个钓点的鱼种数量要多一倍，但它们移动起来特别慢，就像泡在糖浆里一样。
Dialogue_zh-CN.70750007451127808: 我知道你一直很喜欢冰钓，但要想钓上来那些冰中巨怪之一，只靠你那支华而不实的牙签可是没戏。
Dialogue_zh-CN.67849132619669505: 这些大家伙可不会随时随地现身，它们会在一整天时间里轮番称霸湖面。
Dialogue_zh-CN.134357092316393472: 嘿……注意到那条奖杯鱼了，是吧？
Dialogue_zh-CN.134357092345753600: 既然你那条宝贝鱼如今在小屋里风风光光地挂着了，我寻思着也该给店里再做一个仿制品摆摆。
Dialogue_zh-CN.134357092345753601: 这么棒的渔获，可不能给忘喽！
Dialogue_zh-CN.135960815461195776: 你的私家池塘……就这价钱？简直跟白捡的没两样。
Dialogue_zh-CN.135960815494750208: 说白了，这地方还得大修一番，少不了出把力、折腾上好些个周末——不过你肯定能搞定。
Dialogue_zh-CN.143512695867432960: 话说回来，{area/lake2}边上那片小荒地，总算挂牌出售啦。
Dialogue_zh-CN.143512695905181696: 要不是觉着你有那股劲儿能把那破地方收拾利索，我也不会提这茬。前一拨人走后，那地方简直就像一群河狸在里头打过群架一样。
Dialogue_zh-CN.143512695905181697: 要是想拿下，就到店里来一趟。我保准给你个公道价。

Items_zh-CN.466145501184: 为猛将和尖牙怪物打造的重型钓竿。
Items_zh-CN.571397365760: 朴实无华，就是根结实的好钓竿，能让你甩线入水，说不定还能钓上人生第一条鱼！
Items_zh-CN.2706063220736: 无汽油助力，无荣耀加身，唯有胆识相随。
Items_zh-CN.2810790797312: 跑起来如梦似幻，前提是你的梦里满是烟雾和湖水。
Items_zh-CN.12062273827758083: 为大块头和尖牙怪打造的重型钓竿。
Items_zh-CN.12061204670308352: 如码头木桩般结实，专钓中等体型狠角色，抛起来顺滑如丝。
Items_zh-CN.12061204670308354: 炫出隐形钓线，鱼儿来不及察觉便上钩了。
Items_zh-CN.12062273827758081: 鱼饵抛得超远，鱼线都差点不够用，适合用来与深水巨物拔河。
Items_zh-CN.20058493363937284: 短粗有力，专为大家伙而生。有点像艾薇·琼斯。
Items_zh-CN.12683519334539264: 像喝了咖啡的花栗鼠一样，咔哒咔哒地穿过碎石路。不过空间很大。
Items_zh-CN.12683519338733571: 外形流畅，行驶稳定，既有回头率又能装鱼获。
Items_zh-CN.12683519338733573: 各种华丽功能一应俱全，不一定都能用得上，但肯定会让人喜上眉梢。
Items_zh-CN.51922548471566336: 默然潜入深水之中，来无影去无踪。
Items_zh-CN.69585853153615872: 多功能钓竿，助你首破冰层并一往无前。
Items_zh-CN.69585853153615874: 在凛冽严寒肆虐之地，这根钓竿稳如磐石。
Items_zh-CN.69649741400317953: 如电锯劈开雪松般开山辟路。
